name: Party page allows creating or joining a study group
description: The Party/Friends page shows either a party discovery view with create/join options, or the user's current party with members and quests.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with valid credentials
Click the Friends or Party link in the sidebar
Verify the page displays either a Create Party button and Join with Code input, or an existing party view showing party name, members section, and quests section
